ProductReview.title: Product Review
ProductReview.description: A review and rating left by a user for a specific menu item.

productId.description: The ID of the menu item being reviewed.

rating.description: The rating given by the user (1-5).

userId.description: The UID of the user who left the review.

userName.description: The name of the user who left the review.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the review was created.

ProductStats.title: Product Stats
ProductStats.description: Aggregate rating statistics for a specific menu item.

averageRating.description: The average rating for the product.

reviewCount.description: The total number of reviews for the product.
